data.title: RED test: Add CI config key and workflow selection assertions to onboarding skill test
data.description:
## Description

Modify tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh to add structural/metadata assertions for CI config coverage in onboarding SKILL.md.

### New Test Functions

1. **test_ci_config_key_coverage**: Assert SKILL.md references ci.fast_gate_job, ci.fast_fail_job, ci.test_ceil_job, ci.integration_workflow in the Phase 3 Step 2b config template section.

2. **test_ci_workflow_confidence_gating**: Assert SKILL.md contains ci_workflow_confidence-gated logic — numbered selection when confidence=low or 2+ CI workflow entries, skip CI question when confidence=high and exactly one entry.

### TDD Requirement
These are metadata/schema validation tests (structural test exemption). Must fail RED before SKILL.md is modified.

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0) after SKILL.md is updated
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] Lint passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_ci_config_key_coverage function exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_ci_config_key_coverage" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_ci_workflow_confidence_gating function exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_ci_workflow_confidence_gating" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] New assertions fail RED before SKILL.md changes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
